title: Water quality standards for chilled water system
summary: Table of water quality standards for different water types (chilled water, cooling water, etc.) including pH, conductivity, chloride, sulfate, etc.

structured_payload.values: pH (25В°C): 6.5~8.2 (chilled water), 6.8~8.0 (others); Conductivity (mS/m) (25В°C): <80 (chilled water), <30 (others); Chloride ion (mgCl-/l): <200 (chilled water), <50 (others); Sulfate ion (mgSO42-/l): <200 (chilled water), <50 (others); Acid consumption (pH4.8) (mgCaCO3/l): <100 (chilled water), <50 (others); Total hardness (mgCaCO3/l): <200 (chilled water), <70 (others); Calcium hardness (mgCaCO3/l): <150 (chilled water), <50 (others); Silica (mgSiO2/l): <50 (chilled water), <30 (others); Iron (mgFe/l): <1.0 (chilled water), <0.3 (others); Copper (mgCu/l): <0.3 (chilled water), <0.1 (others); Sulfide ion (mgS2-/l): not detected; Ammonium ion (mgNH4+/l): <1.0 (chilled water), <0.1 (others); Residual chlorine (mgCl/l): <0.3; Free carbon dioxide (mgCO2/l): <4.0; Stability index: 6.0~7.0
